description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3 Docker image and defines a single job named pages in the default test stage. The pages job should run only on push events and execute the exact commands: cd documents, pip install -r requirements.txt, mkdocs build, and mv site ../public. It must publish the resulting ../public directory as an artifact with path public, which GitLab Pages will serve. No services, caches, or extra variables are required.
